posts.raw_content:
Essentially, you treat legal and illegal the same

That's what the SCOTUS decision does.

So they're all legal now?  Good.  Legal Immigration rate is zero now.  Walk on over, criminals!

---
Congrats, criminals, AND SCOTUS, if something like this bill I propose passes, you will have ruined legal immigration for the rest of the world.

Also, good people's behavior changes when they realize they are surrounded by cheats and fraudsters.

Suddenly, America isn't so nice to you, and if people here a blip of Spanish they're going to think less of you.  

Way to represent your country, language and culture.
